subject: fix(pwa): code quality fixes + wire checkForUpdate into UI
body:
Code quality:
- Remove redundant if (!deferredPrompt) inside already-guarded block
- Pass browser parameter to trackInstallEvent() instead of re-detecting
- Extract 1500ms settle delay to UPDATE_CHECK_SETTLE_MS named constant
- Remove unused export from CHROMIUM_BROWSERS (nothing imports it)

Wire checkForUpdate into UI:
- App.jsx: destructure checkForUpdate/checking from usePWAUpdate
- MobileLayout: "Check for Updates" burger menu item with toast feedback
  (hidden when update already detected, disabled while checking)
- DesktopLayout: header button with animate-spin while checking, toast
  feedback on result, replaces update button slot when no update detected
- Toast messages: "You're on the latest version" (success), "Update
  available" (info), "Could not check" (warning), "Not available" (info)

Tags: pwa, ui, code-quality, burger-menu
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01AC1UWyZGqVwHGuu6SPJr72
